title: Helmut Horacek
text: Home * People * Helmut Horacek Helmut Horacek [1] Helmut Horacek , an Austrian computer scientist, mathematician and AI -researcher with focus on natural language processing affiliated with the German Research Centre for Artificial Intelligence , Saarbrücken [2] , and Saarland University . During the early 80, along with Hermann Kaindl , Marcus Wagner and Roland Schreier , Helmut Horacek was co-author of the chess program Merlin , competing at various ACM North American Computer Chess Championships and two World Computer Chess Championships in the 80s [3] . He is further author of the Pawn Endgame program PawnKing , which was also subject of his Ph.D. thesis, co-supervised by Wilhelm Barth from Vienna University of Technology and Curt Christian from University of Vienna [4] . As elaborated in his 1983 paper [5] , PawnKing relies on pawn - and king-pattern with bitboards as well as path algorithms to guide the search in his knowledge-based move selection and evaluation approach.
